english.error_no_api_key: Please enter your API key in Settings.
english.error_invalid_key: Invalid API key. Please check your settings.
english.error_quota: API quota exceeded. Please check your provider account.
english.error_timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
english.error_json: Could not parse the AI response. Please try again.
english.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

french.error_invalid_key: Clé API invalide. Veuillez vérifier vos paramètres.
french.error_quota: Quota API dépassé. Veuillez vérifier votre compte fournisseur.
